stages.native:
with latest as (
  select max(season::int) as latest_season
  from public.membership_packages
), counts as (
  select
    trim(p.category) as category,
    min(p.display_order) as display_order,
    p.season as season,
    count(*)::int as count
  from public.raw_members m
  join public.membership_packages p
    on m."Membership" = p.name
  join latest l
    on p.season in ((l.latest_season - 1)::text, l.latest_season::text)
  where trim(p.category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    and trim(p.category) <> ''
    and p.category is not null
    and m."Payment" in ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    and coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
  group by trim(p.category), p.season
)
select
  category,
  coalesce(max(case when season = ((select latest_season from latest) - 1)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Previous Year",
  coalesce(max(case when season = (select latest_season from latest)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Current Year"
from counts
group by category
order by min(display_order), category;

visualization_settings.card.title: Membership categories compared to last year

stages.native:
SELECT
  p.category,
  p.display_order,
  count(*) AS Count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
GROUP BY p.category, p.display_order
ORDER BY p.display_order;

visualization_settings.text:
# Signup Report

This page shows information about the about the Selected Year signups.

stages.native:
SELECT
  e.id AS execution_id,
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  e.mode,
  e."startedAt" AS started_at,
  e."stoppedAt" AS stopped_at,
  round(extract(epoch from (coalesce(e."stoppedAt", now()) - e."startedAt"))::numeric, 1) AS duration_seconds
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
ORDER BY e."startedAt" DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  m."Payment" AS "Payment",
  m."Status" AS "Status",
  count(*) AS "count"
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.category = 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.season = {{year}}
GROUP BY m."Payment", m."Status"
ORDER BY m."Payment", m."Status";

SELECT
  count(*) AS count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
;

visualization_settings.text:
# Membership Report

This page summarizes information about the Selected Year memberships.

card.name: n8n Executions by Workflow and Status

stages.native:
SELECT
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  count(*) AS execution_count,
  max(e."startedAt") AS latest_execution_at
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
GROUP BY w.name, e.status
ORDER BY w.name, e.status;

SELECT 
    s.signup_date,
    s.member,
    s.payer,
    s.product,
    b.status AS batch_status,
    x."Address 1", 
    x."Address 2", 
    x."town", 
    x."postcode",
    -- Create a simple 'True/False' column for the parent product
    CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
    CASE WHEN s.product <> '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_other_product,
    CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_key
FROM "public"."signup_batches" AS b
INNER JOIN "public"."member_signups" AS s ON b.id = s.batch_id
LEFT JOIN "public"."raw_contacts" AS x ON s.payer = CONCAT(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
WHERE b.status = 'Processing'

WITH current_batch AS (
  SELECT id
  FROM public.signup_batches
  WHERE status = 'Processing'
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  c.payer,
  c.address_1 AS "Address 1",
  c.address_2 AS "Address 2",
  c.address_3 AS "Address 3",
  c.town,
  c.postcode,
  c.parent_tags AS "Parent Tags",
  c.regular_tags AS "Regular Tags",
  c.key_tags AS "Key",
  c.total_items AS "Total Items",
  c.has_manual_items AS "Has Manual Items"
FROM public.vw_signup_batch_consolidated AS c
JOIN current_batch AS b
  ON b.id = c.batch_id
ORDER BY c.payer, c.address_1 NULLS LAST, c.address_2 NULLS LAST, c.address_3 NULLS LAST, c.town NULLS LAST, c.postcode NULLS LAST;

card.name: Count of Non-Active Members - Previous Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
;

SELECT
  m."First name",
  m."Last name",
  m."Gender",
  m."Age",
  m."Email address",
  m."Phone number",
  m."Mobile number",
  m."Address 1",
  m."Address 2",
  m."Address 3",
  m."Town",
  m."County",
  m."Country",
  m."Postcode",
  p.category,
  u.id,
  u.postcode AS postcode_2,
  u.latitude,
  u.longitude
FROM public.raw_members m
LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
LEFT JOIN public.ukpostcodes u
  ON upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     ) = upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     )
WHERE m."Status" = 'Active'
  AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.season = {{year}}
ORDER BY m."Last name", m."First name"

card.name: Count of New Members - Selected Year

stages.native:
WITH season_members AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
      person_key,
      trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
      src."Venue ID",
      src."British Tennis Number",
      src."First name",
      src."Last name",
      src."Membership",
      src.category,
      src."Email address",
      src."Postcode",
      src."Payment",
      src."Status",
      src."Start Date",
      src."Expiry Date"
    FROM (
      SELECT
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
          NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
          'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
        ) AS person_key,
        m.*, p.category, p.display_order
      FROM public.raw_members m
      JOIN public.membership_packages p
        ON m."Membership" = p.name
       AND p.season = {{year}}
      WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
        AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    ) src
    ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
  ), prev_members AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
      person_key,
      trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
      src."Venue ID",
      src."British Tennis Number",
      src."First name",
      src."Last name",
      src."Membership",
      src.category,
      src."Email address",
      src."Postcode",
      src."Payment",
      src."Status",
      src."Start Date",
      src."Expiry Date"
    FROM (
      SELECT
        COALESCE(
          NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
          NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
          'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
        ) AS person_key,
        m.*, p.category, p.display_order
      FROM public.raw_members m
      JOIN public.membership_packages p
        ON m."Membership" = p.name
       AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
      WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
        AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    ) src
    ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
  )
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM season_members c
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM prev_members p WHERE p.person_key = c.person_key
);

SELECT
  '⚙️' AS "Add Items",
  concat(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") AS "Name",
  rm."First name",
  rm."Last name",
  rm."Membership",
  rm."Email address",
  rm."Phone number",
  rm."Mobile number"
FROM public.raw_members rm
LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages mp
  ON rm."Membership" = mp.name
WHERE COALESCE(mp.category, '') <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
[[AND mp.season = {{year}}]]
[[AND concat(rm."First name", ' ', rm."Last name") ILIKE '%' || {{search}} || '%']]
ORDER BY rm."Last name", rm."First name", rm."Membership";

card.name: Count of Non-Active Members - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
;

SELECT
  signup_date,
  member,
  product,
  payer,
  cost,
  quantity,
  method,
  status,
  id,
  clubspark_status,
  batch_id
FROM member_signups
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM signup_date) = ({{year}})::int
ORDER BY signup_date DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  '⚙️' AS "Actions",
  b.id AS batch_id,
  b.status,
  b.created_at,
  b.completed_at,
  b.no_address_email_sent,
  COALESCE(s.signup_rows, 0) AS signup_row_count,
  COALESCE(s.manual_rows, 0) AS manual_row_count,
  COALESCE(s.signup_rows, 0) + COALESCE(s.manual_rows, 0) AS member_row_count,
  COALESCE(s.regular_tags, 0) AS regular_tags,
  COALESCE(s.parent_tags, 0) AS parent_tags,
  COALESCE(s.key_tags, 0) AS keys,
  COALESCE(s.total_items, 0) AS total_items
FROM public.signup_batches AS b
LEFT JOIN public.vw_signup_batches_summary AS s
  ON s.batch_id = b.id
ORDER BY b.id DESC;

SELECT
  count(*) AS count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" = 'Active';

with latest as (
  select max(season::int) as latest_season
  from public.membership_packages
), source_rows as (
  select
    case
      when m."Age" is null then null
      when m."Age" >= 90 then '90-99'
      else lpad((floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10)::text, 2, '0') || '-' || lpad((floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10 + 9)::text, 2, '0')
    end as age_range,
    case
      when m."Age" is null then null
      when m."Age" >= 90 then 90
      else (floor(m."Age" / 10) * 10)::int
    end as age_sort,
    p.season
  from public.raw_members m
  join public.membership_packages p
    on m."Membership" = p.name
  join latest l
    on p.season in ((l.latest_season - 1)::text, l.latest_season::text)
  where p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
    and p.category is not null
    and m."Payment" in ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    and m."Age" is not null
    and coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
), counts as (
  select age_range, age_sort, season, count(*)::int as count
  from source_rows
  group by age_range, age_sort, season
)
select
  age_range as "Age Range",
  coalesce(max(case when season = ((select latest_season from latest) - 1)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Previous Year",
  coalesce(max(case when season = (select latest_season from latest)::text then count end), 0)::int as "Current Year"
from counts
group by age_range, age_sort
order by age_sort;

card.name: List of Members Not Renewed - Selected Year

stages.native:
WITH current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Postcode",
    src."Start Date",
    src."Expiry Date"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), previous_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Postcode",
    src."Start Date",
    src."Expiry Date"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT
  p."First name",
  p."Last name",
  p."Membership",
  p.category AS "Membership Category",
  p."Email address",
  p."Venue ID",
  p."British Tennis Number",
  p."Postcode",
  p."Start Date",
  p."Expiry Date"
FROM previous_members p
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM current_members c WHERE c.person_key = p.person_key
)
ORDER BY p.category, p.full_name;

SELECT p.category AS category, count(*) AS count FROM public.raw_members AS m JOIN public.membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name WHERE p.season = {{year}} AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key' AND m."Status" = 'Active' AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid') AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true GROUP BY p.category, p.display_order ORDER BY p.display_order;

card.name: Count of Members Not Renewed - Selected Year

stages.native:
WITH current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Postcode",
    src."Start Date",
    src."Expiry Date"
  FROM (

        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), previous_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Postcode",
    src."Start Date",
    src."Expiry Date"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM previous_members p
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM current_members c WHERE c.person_key = p.person_key
);

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS signup_hour, count(*) AS count
FROM public.member_signups
WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY signup_hour
ORDER BY signup_hour

SELECT signup_day, count(*) AS count
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int
      WHEN 1 THEN 'Monday'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'Tuesday'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'Wednesday'
      WHEN 4 THEN 'Thursday'
      WHEN 5 THEN 'Friday'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'Saturday'
      WHEN 7 THEN 'Sunday'
    END AS signup_day,
    EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS sort_order
  FROM public.member_signups
  WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
) t
GROUP BY signup_day, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

  c.category AS "Membership Category",
  c."Email address",
  c."Venue ID",

  c."Postcode",

FROM season_members c

)
ORDER BY c.category, c.full_name;

card.name: Count of Members Missing Signup Capture - Selected Year

stages.native:
WITH current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."Membership",
    COALESCE(
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Date joined venue", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Start Date", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY')
    ) AS effective_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
      AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), signups AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    lower(trim(member)) AS member_name,
    lower(trim(product)) AS product_name
  FROM public.member_signups
  WHERE product LIKE '%' || {{year}} || '%'
), missing AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM current_members c
  LEFT JOIN signups s
    ON lower(trim(c.full_name)) = s.member_name
   AND lower(trim(c."Membership")) = s.product_name
  WHERE s.member_name IS NULL
    AND c.effective_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      c.effective_date > current_date
      OR c.effective_date::timestamp <= now() - interval '1 hour'
    )
)
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM missing;

card.name: List of Members Who Changed Package - Selected Year

stages.native:
WITH season_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), prev_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number"
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
)
SELECT
  c."First name",
  c."Last name",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c."Email address", ''), p."Email address") AS "Email address",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c."Venue ID", ''), p."Venue ID") AS "Venue ID",
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c."British Tennis Number", ''), p."British Tennis Number") AS "British Tennis Number",
  p.category AS "Previous Category",
  c.category AS "Current Category",
  p."Membership" AS "Previous Membership",
  c."Membership" AS "Current Membership"
FROM season_members c
JOIN prev_members p
  ON p.person_key = c.person_key
WHERE c.category <> p.category
ORDER BY c."Last name", c."First name";

card.name: List of Members Missing Signup Capture - Selected Year

stages.native:
WITH current_members AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (person_key)
    person_key,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', src."First name", src."Last name")) AS full_name,
    src."First name",
    src."Last name",
    src."Membership",
    src.category,
    src."Email address",
    src."Venue ID",
    src."British Tennis Number",
    COALESCE(
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Date joined venue", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY'),
      to_date(NULLIF(src."Start Date", ''), 'DD/MM/YYYY')
    ) AS effective_date
  FROM (
    SELECT
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF('venue:' || trim(COALESCE(m."Venue ID", '')), 'venue:'),
        NULLIF('btn:' || trim(COALESCE(m."British Tennis Number", '')), 'btn:'),
        'name:' || lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', m."First name", m."Last name")))
      ) AS person_key,
      m.*, p.category, p.display_order
    FROM public.raw_members m
    JOIN public.membership_packages p
      ON m."Membership" = p.name
     AND p.season = {{year}}
    WHERE p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Honorary', 'Social')
      AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
      AND COALESCE(m.is_current, true) = true
  ) src
  ORDER BY person_key, src.display_order, src."Membership"
), signups AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    lower(trim(member)) AS member_name,
    lower(trim(product)) AS product_name
  FROM public.member_signups
  WHERE product LIKE '%' || {{year}} || '%'
), missing AS (
  SELECT
    c.*,
    (current_date - c.effective_date) AS days_since_effective
  FROM current_members c
  LEFT JOIN signups s
    ON lower(trim(c.full_name)) = s.member_name
   AND lower(trim(c."Membership")) = s.product_name
  WHERE s.member_name IS NULL
    AND c.effective_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      c.effective_date > current_date
      OR c.effective_date::timestamp <= now() - interval '1 hour'
    )
)
SELECT
  full_name AS "Member",
  "Membership",
  category AS "Membership Category",
  "Email address",
  "Venue ID",
  "British Tennis Number",
  effective_date AS "Effective Date",
  days_since_effective AS "Days Since Effective",
  'Create Signup' AS "Create Signup"
FROM missing
ORDER BY effective_date, full_name;

card.description: Writable admin view of public.global_settings. Open the question to edit values.
card.name: Global Settings
